title: Blender Tabletop Workspace Reconstruction
summary: Reconstruct a tabletop robotic-manipulation workspace in Blender from a floor plan, a reference render, and staged mesh assets, then save the scene, render a verification image, and export the required OBJ files.
taskPrompt: You are a robotics-focused 3D scene artist using Blender.¥n¥nYour task is to reconstruct a tabletop robotic-manipulation workspace from staged assets.¥n¥nAgent-visible inputs:¥n- Export contract: `base¥¥input¥¥export_spec.json`¥n- Floor plan: `base¥¥input¥¥floor_plan.png`¥n- Reference render: `base¥¥input¥¥reference_render.png`¥n- Mesh assets: `base¥¥input¥¥meshes`¥n¥nSoftware:¥n- Launch Blender through the staged task-local wrapper: `base¥¥software¥¥run_blender_portable.ps1`¥n¥nRequired outputs under `base¥¥output`:¥n- `scene.blend`¥n- `verification_render.png`¥n- `mustard_bottle.obj`¥n- `mug.obj`¥n- `potted_meat_can.obj`¥n- `full_scene.obj`¥n¥nRequirements:¥n- Use the floor plan for explicit spatial values and camera setup¥n- Infer rotations, materials, and lighting from the reference render¥n- Keep the coordinate system z-up and 1 Blender unit = 1 meter¥n- Save the rendered image as `verification_render.png`¥n
agentMustDo: Reconstruct the tabletop manipulation scene in Blender using the floor plan, reference render, and staged mesh assets.
Place the table and three YCB objects at the positions specified by the visible floor plan.
Infer rotations, materials, and lighting from the reference render.

inputFiles.name: export_spec.json
inputFiles.description: Defines the required render and export filenames.

inputFiles.name: floor_plan.png
inputFiles.description: Provides explicit spatial values for object placement, table dimensions, and camera setup.

inputFiles.name: reference_render.png
inputFiles.description: Visible visual target used to infer rotations, materials, and lighting.

inputFiles.name: meshes/
inputFiles.description: Source geometry for the table and three YCB objects.

referenceFiles.name: scene.blend
referenceFiles.description: Saved Blender scene containing the reconstructed tabletop workspace.

referenceFiles.name: verification_render.png
referenceFiles.description: Rendered verification image of the reconstructed scene.

referenceFiles.name: OBJ exports
referenceFiles.description: The required per-object exports and one full-scene export.

evaluation: **Hard gate behavior**¥n- Missing `output/scene.blend` yields `0.0`.¥n- Missing hidden benchmark reference facts yields `0.0`.¥n- Failure to extract Blender-side metrics yields `0.0`.¥n¥n**Scoring method**¥n- The evaluator opens the submitted `scene.blend` through the staged Blender runtime.¥n- It extracts object transforms, material values, light placements, and required-output presence.¥n- It compares those metrics against hidden benchmark reference facts for the target scene.¥n- The normalized score combines spatial accuracy (`25%`), rotation accuracy (`15%`), material accuracy (`20%`), export completeness (`15%`), and lighting plausibility (`25%`).¥n- Current reviewed pass threshold: `0.70`.¥n¥n**Reviewed fixture behavior**¥n- Positive fixture: `0.8441666666666667`¥n- Negative fixture: `0.4368055555555556`¥n- Empty/default output: `0.0`

evaluatorCredentials.purpose: OpenAI vision/LLM judge scores the deliverable during evaluate(); sourced from secret/eval_time/openai.env
